about.heading: An organisation that has been working for over 40 years
about.p1: The Student Government of Wrocław University of Economics and Business is an organisation that for over 40 years has represented students’ interests before the university authorities, the city and national institutions. We run projects, organise events and make sure the student voice is heard.
about.p2: We bring together people who care. Anyone of you can join our team and help shape the UEW academic community.
about.quote: We don’t wait for change. We create it.
